DashboardData.title: Dashboard Data
DashboardData.description: Stores the latest transaction, sales, and penalty CSV data.

lastUpdatedTrx.description: The timestamp of the last transaction update.

lastUpdatedSales.description: The timestamp of the last sales update.

lastUpdatedPenalty.description: The timestamp of the last penalty update.

updatedBy.description: The user ID of the person who last updated the data.

/dashboard_data/latest.description: The single document holding the most recent dashboard data.
